title: Chandraare Lyrics Amaran Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Chandhirarae sooriyare
natchathira naayagare
amaran kadhaya konja
arindhu vandhu sollungalen

veeramulla aambala
avan marava kula
manippulla..
avan marava kula
manippulla..

dhairiyam irundhuchunaa
samuththiramum kaal alavu
thunichal valarndhirundhaa
thoongalellaam nool alavu

edhiri illaiyinu
ezhudhi vachchaan yaettula
idhaya padikkavilla
avanum oru kannanae
avan kadala pola
kaththa pola
kaakka vandha saaminga

amara seerivandhaa
alaiyum kooda adangumey
kuththamulla oorula
avan suththamulla aalunga

avan mugatha paaththu
manasu pooththu
kodi sanam vazhthunga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chandraare?

The song Chandraare expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, evoking a sense of nostalgia.

What is the plot context of the movie Amaran?

The movie Amaran revolves around themes of love and sacrifice, showcasing the emotional journey of its characters.

Who is the singer of Chandraare?

The song is beautifully rendered by the legendary singer K. J. Yesudas.

Who composed the music for Amaran?

The music for Amaran was composed by Adithyan, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Chandraare released?

The song was released on January 15, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Chandraare from the movie Amaran, the lyrics beautifully depict the emotions of love and longing. The soothing melody, sung by K. J. Yesudas, creates a nostalgic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This classic piece captures the essence of romantic moments, making it perfect for celebrations and intimate occasions. The heartfelt expressions in the song evoke a sense of warmth and connection, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Chandraare, a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the soulful voice of K. J. Yesudas, this song from the classic film Amaran transports listeners to a world of love and longing. Let the soothing lyrics and beautiful composition sweep you off your feet and evoke cherished memories.
stanzaMeanings: Moon, Sun, Star, Leader, I will share a little of the immortal story.
He is a brave man, he will not forget his lineage.. he will not forget his lineage..
If there is courage, the ocean will also be at the right level, if the strength grows, everything will be in balance.
There is no one to oppose, he has written it down, he cannot read the heart, he is like a thief who came like a lover.
Like a brother, he will change the mind of the people, he will hunt down the lion.
In the prosperous land, even the waves will settle, he is a pure person in the village.
Look at his face, fill your heart, praise the flag of love.
